description_long: This object consists of two distinct swords placed side by side. The left sword features a gently curved, single-edged blade reminiscent of a katana, with a black handle wrapped in a crisscross pattern of white diamonds and a small, circular guard. The right sword has a much broader, straight blade with a sharply pointed tip and a pronounced, angular guard that flares outward, giving it a fantasy or ceremonial appearance. The right sword's handle is shorter, with a blue grip and a geometric pommel. Both swords have metallic blades with a dark finish, and their handles incorporate both dark and colored materials for visual contrast. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and fantasy influences, with the left sword being more utilitarian and the right more ornamental. No sheaths or scabbards are present with either sword.
description: A pair of swords: one is a traditional curved katana with a wrapped handle, the other is a broad, straight-bladed fantasy sword with an angular guard and blue grip.
description_view_0: Both swords are shown side by side, highlighting the katana's curved blade and the fantasy sword's wide, angular guard and straight blade.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thinness of both blades and the profile of the guards and handles.
description_view_2: Reverse side of both swords, again showing the blade shapes and handle details, with the fantasy sword's guard and pommel more visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the slimness and alignment of the blades.
attribute_blade_type: one curved single-edged katana blade, one straight broad double-edged fantasy blade
attribute_handle_design: katana: black handle with white diamond wrap; fantasy sword: short blue grip with geometric pommel
attribute_ornamentation: white diamond pattern on katana handle, angular guard on fantasy sword
